tagline: Professional Lawn Care - Lasting First Impressions

hero.headline:
Your Landscape Deserves Southern
Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From commercial grounds to backyard lighting, Brent Moore Jr. and 47 dedicated pros have kept Southeast properties looking their best since 2011. You focus on your business or family — we handle everything outside.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Care That Keeps<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Property Pristine
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple vendors for your landscape needs. Outdoor Living Southeast handles everything from weekly mowing to holiday lighting — one team, one call, year-round excellence.

cards.title: Commercial Lawn Care
cards.description: Routine mowing, pruning, and seasonal planting that keeps your business property looking sharp and professional every day of the year.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Custom-designed outdoor lighting for beauty and security. We transform your home or business after dark with energy-efficient LED systems.

cards.title: Irrigation Services
cards.description: Full installation, repair, and seasonal adjustment of irrigation systems so your lawn and landscapes stay properly watered without waste.

cards.title: Christmas Lighting
cards.description: Professional holiday light design, installation, and takedown. We handle every detail so you enjoy the season stress-free.

cards.title: Turf Management
cards.description: Specialized fertilization, soil treatment, and weed control programs that deliver thick, healthy turf you can be proud of.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive care including shrub trimming, weed control, pine straw, mulching, fertilization, and flower bed installation.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Picture-Perfect Property

steps.title: Request Your Free Walkthrough
steps.description: Tell us about your property. We'll schedule a free on-site assessment and deliver an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Transform Your Outdoors
steps.description: Our 47-member crew arrives on schedule with commercial-grade equipment. Mowing, lighting, irrigation, seasonal color — we handle it all with craftsman-level care.

steps.title: Enjoy a Stunning Property
steps.description: Your landscape stays pristine year-round while you focus on what matters. If you're ever not thrilled with a visit, we come back and make it right — free.

about.label: Why Property Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Valdosta-Born, Southeast-Proven — Your Landscape Team
about.description: Founded in 2011 by Valdosta native Brent Moore Jr., Outdoor Living Southeast has grown from a small crew of 5 to a team of 47 dedicated professionals. We serve commercial and residential clients across South Georgia, North Florida, Central Florida, and East Alabama. Built on faith, integrity, and craftsmanship, we don't just maintain properties — we transform outdoor spaces and strengthen communities.

features.title: 47 Dedicated Professionals
features.description: Every team member is trained in our core values of professionalism, integrity, and craftsmanship before they ever step onto your property.

features.title: No Contracts. Earn It Every Visit.
features.description: We keep your business by delivering results, not by locking you into agreements. Cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. That's our promise rooted in integrity.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your property. Scale up, scale down, or cancel anytime — no long-term contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Southern Standard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll return to make it right at absolutely no charge. No fine print, no runaround. We've built our reputation on doing what we say — and your property proves it every single day.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service on my property?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent needs like storm cleanup or event prep, we offer expedited response. Just call us at 229-560-7421 and we'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve commercial properties like office parks, HOAs, banks, and retail centers, as well as residential clients for landscape lighting, holiday lighting, and lawn care. One team handles it all.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We cover a wide regional footprint including South Georgia, Middle Georgia, East Georgia, North Florida, Central Florida, and East Alabama — from Valdosta to Macon, Orlando, Jacksonville, Tallahassee, and beyond.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every single visit. No contracts, no cancellation penalties. If we're not delivering results, you're free to go — but our 4.9-star rating shows that rarely happens.

faqs.question: What makes Outdoor Living Southeast different from other landscapers?
faqs.answer: We've grown from 5 people to 47 since 2011 because we treat every property like our own. Our team operates on core values of integrity, professionalism, and craftsmanship — backed by a satisfaction guarantee and 86+ five-star reviews.

testimonials.name: Carl Holley
testimonials.text: I have great confidence in their work quality, timeliness, and fairness. Outdoor Living Southeast consistently delivers professional results that exceed expectations for our commercial properties.

testimonials.name: Sherry M.
testimonials.text: Brent goes above and beyond to meet client expectations. The attention to detail and reliability we experience every single visit has made them our trusted landscape partner for years.

testimonials.name: Jennifer T.
testimonials.text: Outdoor Living did a fantastic job on my Christmas lights installation. They answered all of my questions beforehand and the lights turned out absolutely beautiful. Highly recommend their holiday services!

contact.headline:
Ready for a Property You're
Proud to Show Off?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure property assessment within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing for expert landscape care.
